caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold letters sits at a desk in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him, a blue sign reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'" next to a red "BOSS" logo and a graphic featuring stars and the word "HUSTLE." On the desk, a black equipment box and a container with "BOSS TALK OUT" written in red and blue text are visible. Throughout the sequence, the man adjusts his large headphones on his head. Initially, he holds the headphones with both hands, then shifts his grip, momentarily lifting one side and adjusting the fit across his ears. He maintains a focused expression, glancing slightly toward the microphone while continuously tweaking the position of his headset.
